chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA 2182 of 2015 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on CMA No.4708/2015. 2. For orders on CMA No.4709/2015. 3. For hearing of main case. 30.09.2025 Mr. Jawed Hussain, advocate holding brief for Mrs. Masooda Siraj, advocate for the applicant. This reference is pending since 2015 without any progress. On 24.11.2015, following order was passed: “24.11.2015 Ms. Masooda Siraj, Advocate for Applicant. Learned Counsel for Applicant requests for some time to reformulate the proposed questions properly since at least three of the so-called questions, as proposed by the department, appear not to be questions at all. Adjourned.” Since that time the applicant has remained unrepresented or adjournment has been sought on behalf of the learned counsel. Same is the case today. It appears that the applicant is not interested in the proceedings, therefore, in view of judgment of CIR vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, this reference application is dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
